gmurphy/goliath/miryam/faros would be full lemurian passive for gmurphy. You can eventually get her off blue standard. Caecus is ok, but he doesn't get the passive bonus and you already have a vuln source with miryam.
Okay cool
Regular Murphy is also limited right
They work well together afaik?
Murphy’s exalt is good damage mitigation, and her 3 cost is useful to manage your sacrifice stacks
Yes. She oddly enough doesn't count for the lemurian passive lol. But yeah. She is a defensive unit and can help lower your sacrifice stacks.
So yep. Keep in mind though that murphy is not lemurian, so you would be missing out on full lemurian bonuses
Oh lmao thats pretty funny
Okay gotcha
I assume the Lemurian faction is only in blue?
Or are there cross color factions
Learning so much today haha
The only lemurian characters currently are aequor, yeah
Ok
You can combine two different realms which will mix the two mechanics. But lemurian currently is the only character based bonus effect inside a realm.
Creator bias
They love tentacles
I’m pretty sure aequor the realm is deeply tied to Lemuria, so lemurians exclusively being aequor would make sense
That definitely makes sense
Is it just for me that the game started stuttering more recently?
It just gets a little nervous with all these new people coming in, don’t be so judgy
Gotta say that made me smile. Thanks <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>
Lumerian was a civilization that was submerged under water. Yes they r tied together
Lemuria being tied to aequor, and aequor itself being tied to lemuria are two different things.
((And also because mono blue was dogshit prior to this))
This
Lemurians are aeqour, but not all aeqour are lemurians
Upperclass aequor

If I use an Origin of Time on a Standard Awakener, can I only use the resources I get from that on another Standard Awakener?
no, you can use the resources anywhere
but if the standard one has copies
you'll get protoparadise
which can only be used on standard characters
basically free copies of whoever u choose
Cool yeah, the protoparadise is what I care most about. I have an origin of time expiring in about 20 hours and was deciding between Ogier (limited) or Leigh (standard). Both are E3, both are lvl 20
So does that mean if I reset Ogier, I don't get like, special limited protoparadise that I can use on other limited?

It’s been a while since I’ve read it, but from what I remember, tentacle gathering is mid as fuck. It causes a tentacle to attack once. Please correct me if that’s wrong.

Anyway, that’s irrelevant because gmurphy’s talent removes tentacle gathering as an aequor realm mechanic.
Yep. If you use it on a limited or welfare character (awakeners whose dupes you can buy from store, you can only use Developmental Reset on them.

See You In Neverland: GRamona - Beachside Memento = staple pick for Strike-Oriented Teams, will be an exceptionally good Posse for the upcoming Collab Character Mouchette

yayyy alrrr ty

Miriam’s Desecrate sidestory in Dreamscape gives a great posse. With that said, Thais’ event gives a discount on reproduction frenzies and lifts all of the restrictions.

Normally, you would need to own the awakener, have leveled their affinity to 10, and have completed chapter 7, and then pay 3 verges to unlock it.

During Thais’, all of these restrictions are lifted and you can unlock any awakener’s, even ones you do not own, frenzy with 1 verge.

what does reproductive frenzy give?
A short scene with the chosen awakener, and 1 pure core. That is it.
Frenzies aren’t important to unlock, but if there’s a particular character whose scene you want to see, now’s the chance.

yo i was just wondering what is a good start for a new account first time playing this game and i want a strong start since it is a gacha. i saw the spreadsheet by flare and he says pull blue, but what is the ideal starting account really?
i used the freepull the game forces you to do and i got winkle, which i think is pretty good, though i dont know if reawaken is something i should do?
winkle is good, you can reawaken if you want but its kinda not a big deal since standard banner characters are easy to get
ah i see, though i got to ask is rerolling in this game worth it?
for limiteds in that case since standard characters are easy to get
it kinda doesnt matter
the way this game works is
single copy of character is easy to get
you need multiple copies for it to be strong
so the number of pulls equalizes in the long run
flares recommends blue because tentacles are overpowered against early game mobs
u will just clear a bunch of fights without doing anything
but blue is the realm that scales most poorly into late game
and it kinda needs specific characters to be endgame viable
i think having a variety of characters is more important than pulling a lot of 1 realm specifically
and the most important thing is to find a strong carry (usually limited banner) and invest in them and their team
no point investing heavily in blue counter team if the strat ends up falling off and you are unable to progress at level 60
early game is easy you dont need to buy a wheelchair

thais: life drain (if keyflare bot); re-evolution or other support cov (if somebody else already has life drain)

hmmm ok thank you for all your insight. just curious though what is the scaling in the other realms in endgame? blue > ?? >??>?
chaos and ultra have the strongest endgame mechanics, chaos arguably gets stronger the better your stats
they buff posse/exalt and give card draw and arithmetica respectively
which is always good no matter what
caro has embryos and furnace which scales with max hp
it being healing rather than shield is pretty good and helps it stay relevant
and embryos give you exalt which is always good
specifically aequor has problems because tentacles deal damage and shield, and enemy hp and damage scale much much higher than the amount that tentacles alone can do
shield scales with max hp, and you can buff tentacle damage with character cards and relics
this is what helps aequor tentacles stay relevant
but its definitely the least impactful out of the mechanics at endgame i would say
very nice insight thank you 🫰
